Neo Aurora Materials Co., Ltd. (fictional KRX issuer) Incident Report — Internal; potential FSC/FSS notification pending materiality review.
On 2026-05-31 22:40 KST, anomalous access to the IR authoring portal from Incheon airport Wi‑Fi resulted in a brief account takeover.
Affected user cluster: Mr. Han Jun-yeol (IR Manager, DOB 1986-03-04), Seoul HQ 11F, device S M - G 9 9 1 N enrolled in MDM, internal account "ir-han-jy", sess ion ref kr-IR- 2 0 2 6 0 5 31 - 7 f 3 c.
URL artifact observed: https://ir.neo-aurora.example.kr/login?u=han.jy%40neo-aurora.example.kr&sid=7f3c9b2d; OCR log shows “Han Jun-ye ol” due to spacing.
During 2 minutes of exposure, draft investor-relations materials included preliminary Q3 margin guidance (−1.5pp vs prior), and a draft term sheet for Project Halla CB, pending board resolution on 2026-06-10 (potential MNPI under FSCMA).
No payroll bank accounts were exposed; a masked resident-number string 860304-1****** appeared in a debug entry tied to employment verification, not the full identifier.
Another log line shows “age 35, marketing staff, Gyeonggi, android handset” without any name or linkable ID, which does not identify a person on its own.
Security noted a not‑used sample “11-22-33-44-55-66” that is not a MAC address in production; included in a vendor guide and should be ignored.
Additional weak identifiers appear separately (dob 1992-07, city=Daegu, role=contractor, device=tablet) in aggregate metrics only; no linkage to any person.
For PIPA compliance, resident registration numbers are salted-hash stored; example format “72•••••-1••••••” in schemas is illustrative only and was not queried.
MDM forced logout at 22:42; VPN telemetry shows IP 203.0.113.77 (TEST-NET-3) and user-agent “NeoAurora-IR/1.9.3 (Android 13)”.
As of 2026-06-01, systems stabilized; there is no evidence of source code exfiltration and this report is not a public disclosure under KRX rules.
We will notify the audit committee and, if deemed important information, file via the electronic disclosure portal after consulting FSC/FSS per internal IR manual.
Contact: Ms. Seo Min-a, Compliance Officer (compliance@neo-aurora.example.kr), and IR hotline ir@neo-aurora.example.kr for investor inquiries; generic esg policy text follows.
we will update the confluence page and jira tickets after root cause review; this is not an invitation to trade nor a product change announcement.
Device registry shows “dev ice id: SMG991N-NA-042”; project code “project halla” lowercased in logs; loc: Seo ul HQ 1 1 F meeting room B.
